note: Mathlib/Geometry/Euclidean/Triangle.lean:284-288, docstring '**Isosceles Triangle Theorem**: Pons asinorum': dist p1 p2 = dist p1 p3 -> angle p1 p2 p3 = angle p1 p3 p2. The classic named theorem about isosceles triangles, not a definition of the object; Mathlib has no IsIsosceles predicate (grep confirmed no other hits).

Mathlib/Algebra/Group/Even.lean:57 def IsSquare (a : alpha) := exists r, a = r*r (general Mul type). Mathlib/NumberTheory/LegendreSymbol/{Basic,QuadraticReciprocity}.lean use IsSquare (a : ZMod p) throughout (e.g. Basic.lean:62 euler_criterion, Basic.lean:180 eq_one_iff) as the standard formalization of 'a is a quadratic residue mod p'; no ZMod-specific QuadraticResidue predicate exists.
